Q: What type of activity does Owner earnings and Warren Buffett have in common?
A: "Owner earnings is a valuation method detailed by Warren Buffett in 1986. Both are involved in the activity of managing their charitable efforts as well as managing a business or company. A: The Argentine PGA Championship record holder, Roberto De Vicenzo, has won 16 tournaments in the Argentine PGA Championship. The total number of tournaments worldwide that De Vicenzo has won is given as more than 230.
A: Exit? No.
A: ["Argentine PGA Championship", "Middle Atlantic PGA Championship", "Roberto De Vicenzo", "Esprit Holdings"]
A: The Argentine PGA Championship record holder, Roberto De Vicenzo, has won 16 tournaments in the Argentine PGA Championship. The total number of tournaments worldwide that De Vicenzo has won is given as more than 230. Thus, De Vicenzo has won more than 230 - 16 = 214 tournaments in tournaments other than the Argentine PGA Championship.
A: Exit? No.
A: ["Argentine PGA Championship", "Middle Atlantic PGA Championship", "Roberto De Vicenzo", "Esprit Holdings"]
A: The Argentine PGA Championship record holder, Roberto De Vicenzo, has won 16 tournaments in the Argentine PGA Championship. The total number of tournaments worldwide that De Vicenzo has won is given as more than 230. Thus, De Vicenzo has won more than 230 - 16 = 214 tournaments in tournaments other than the Argentine PGA Championship. So the answer is: more than 214..

A: The character of the protagonist of William Shakespeare's tragedy who secretly loves and marries a member of the rival house is Romeo Montague. Benvolio is Romeo's friend who disarms Tybalt in the "Romeo and Juliet" play. Therefore, Benvolio does not slay the cousin. It is Romeo who slays Tybalt. Thus, the answer is: Tybalt.
